hero.description: Software engineer with a great passion for building web applications with clean architecture and modern technologies. I always enjoy the process of learning and building new projects.

text: My career began in 2019 when I joined a company that offered me the opportunity to learn software development using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Python. This experience was incredibly helpful in teaching me how a corporate ecosystem functions within the programming field.

In 2021, I was hired by a North American company where I expanded my knowledge by developing multiple frontend templates with Bootstrap, then Tailwind, Angular, and eventually React. As I grew within the company, I began working with more modern technologies like Next.js and TypeScript. As our team's needs evolved, I ventured into backend development by designing a CMS built with Next.js, Express.js, and MySQL.

Starting in 2024, I began working more independently, taking on solo projects and collaborating on public sector applications. Since then, I have been working with Next.js, designing everything from the interface to the backend and implementing databases for applications that remain in use today.

I have always enjoyed traveling; it is one of the experiences that fulfills me most, as are extreme sports like mountain biking, jet skiing, and snowboarding. Among the places I’ve visited in Mexico are Cancun, Chiapas, Tulum, Playa del Carmen, Mexico City, Monterrey, Guadalajara, and Puebla. In 2024, I had the chance to travel to Canada to snowboard at an Olympic venue, an experience I hope to repeat whenever I get the chance.

I really enjoy going to the beach, taking photographs, and creating music. I currently have my own music studio for rehearsals where I spend time whenever inspiration strikes. Eventually, I want to release my first album, which is still in the creative process with the goal of finishing my first collection of songs by mid-2027.

Among my favorite conversation topics, philosophy holds the number one spot, followed by technological advances and their implications for both society and nature. I also enjoy stories that blend fantasy and science fiction, as well as world history.

metadata.title: Eduardo Meza | Full Stack Developer
metadata.excerpt: Software engineer specialized in developing web applications with Next.js, TypeScript and Node.js.
